programs.title: Someone Like You
programs.desc: After the loss of his best friend, a young architect launches a search for her secret twin sister.

programs.title: A Brush With Christmas
programs.desc: Charlotte discovers her latest painting has been anonymously submitted to an art festival.

programs.title: Just in Time
programs.desc: Hannah receives a call from a stranger, who claims to have discovered an heirloom from her family.

programs.title: Swing Into Romance
programs.desc: A dancer pairs with an unlikely partner, entering a contest to save her family's general store.

programs.title: Home Sweet Christmas
programs.desc: Sparks fly between a woman and a childhood friend after they inherit a patch of sugar maple forest.

programs.title: Christmas on Windmill Way
programs.desc: Mia Miejer learns that her Mimi must sell property which has been in their family for generations.
